Short_Term_Momentum_Volume_Factor_5D.description: This factor combines short-term price momentum with volume confirmation to predict future returns. It uses a 5-day window for momentum and checks for positive volume change to validate the trend strength

variables.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day
variables.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day
variables.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 5): Percentage change in volume over the past 5 days

Volume_Growth_Momentum_Factor_10D.description: This factor measures the relationship between volume growth and short-term momentum. It uses a 10-day window for momentum and requires positive volume growth to validate the trend

variables.$return: Daily return of the stock on that day
variables.$volume: Volume of the stock on that day
variables.TS_PCTCHANGE($volume, 10): Percentage change in volume over the past 10 days
